title: Carcinoma of the Vulva
abstract: Vulvar cancer is a rare gynecologic malignancy that predominantly affects postmenopausal women, and adherence to the technical standards for image acquisition and interpretation is imperative for precise staging, restaging, and assessment of recurrence.
cleanedBodyBlocks: Vulvar cancer is a rare gynecologic malignancy that predominantly affects postmenopausal women.
Precise staging, restaging, and assessment of recurrence depend on adherence to technical standards for image acquisition and interpretation.
